scope: Local ONDC Buyer, Seller, combined UI/UX and accessibility smoke, Buyer Samantha, Seller Samantha, and supporting deterministic gates

customer_missions.result: Search, compare, add, remove, re-add, checkout, AgentGuard authorization, and visible receipt completed.
customer_missions.terminal_state: Order 88FDF65A, INR 89.00, Created, signed reference verified, fulfillment pending seller confirmation.
customer_missions.first_friction: Checkout retained the incomplete-quote instruction after all required fields were complete and authorization was enabled.
customer_missions.screenshot_evidence: Three Chrome captures were read in-session; no filesystem paths were emitted.

customer_missions.result: Published Kaveri Toor Dal 1kg at INR 145 with stock 18 and accepted prepared paid order 2BEE2CD5.
customer_missions.terminal_state: Order remained Accepted; dispatch, completion, and refund were unproven.
customer_missions.first_friction: Dispatch tracking prompt disconnected Chrome control. The single fresh recovery repeated the same browser-unavailable class.
customer_missions.screenshot_evidence: Two Chrome captures were read in-session; no filesystem paths were emitted.

customer_missions.result: Buyer and Seller read-only missions completed with keyboard navigation and five deduplicated findings.

passed: Low-value checkout with signed AgentGuard authorization
customer_missions.voice: Not Tested: no visible microphone control or status; no ambient audio captured.
customer_missions.screenshot_evidence: Two Chrome captures were read in-session; no filesystem paths were emitted.

passed: Fresh Toor Dal 1 kg publish at INR 189 with stock 24
customer_missions.voice: Not Tested: Listening + text ready appeared, but no microphone permission or ambient audio was used.
customer_missions.screenshot_evidence: Two Chrome captures were read in-session; no filesystem paths were emitted.

issues.summary: Quote instruction remains stale after checkout form completion
issues.evidence: All required delivery fields were complete and Authorize and place order was enabled, but the page still said Complete the form to estimate delivery, tax, and the final quote.

issues.summary: Customer results mix credible offers with fixture-like catalog litter and incomplete commerce terms
issues.evidence: Atta results included Dispatch Proof-style listings alongside Sampoorna; seller, delivery, and returns context was incomplete on affected cards.

issues.summary: Samantha is not keyboard-accessible as a dialog
issues.evidence: Keyboard opening left focus on BODY, exposed no dialog or panel heading semantics, and Escape did not close; Seller supplied the expected dialog, heading, focus, and Escape behavior.

issues.summary: Listening plus text ready ambiguously implies microphone capture
issues.evidence: The state appeared without a visible microphone control, consent affordance, or explanation of whether audio capture was active.

issues.summary: Execution boundaries are inconsistent and customer surfaces expose internal jargon
issues.evidence: Buyer enabled Checkout, Cancel order, Return, and Accept remedy without clear confirmation boundaries; visible copy exposed principal:demo, seller principal, PII-free AgentGuard receipts, and Mandate: active.

issues.summary: Consequential network controls remain enabled with incomplete connection details
issues.evidence: Generate key pair, Save configuration, and Test connection remained enabled while Connection details incomplete was visible.

issues.summary: Selected order queue is visual only
issues.evidence: Keyboard activation worked, but the active pending 0 button exposed neither aria-pressed nor aria-current.

issues.summary: Cart navigation is misclassified as catalog search and leaks internal operator instructions
issues.evidence: Show me my cart navigated to q=Show+me+my+cart. with zero offers and exposed Tell the user honestly none matched - do not invent products or say they are still loading.

issues.summary: Preference success claim disagrees with the visible memory owner
issues.evidence: Samantha said Remembered preference: Prefers whole wheat groceries, while Preferences showed Likes, Dislikes, Preferences, and Notes all as dash.

issues.summary: Background task completes without producing the requested weekly basket
issues.evidence: The terminal state said Background task complete and Nothing has been added to the cart yet, with no visible plan or completed requested basket.
After a full fictional address was submitted, the visible order detail reduced delivery address to IND.
Observed replies ended at Done! ... you're on the cart and If you want me to proceed with.

issues.summary: Seller data disappears across demo sign-ins because each session receives a new principal
issues.evidence: A prepared order and published catalog existed for the prior signed-in seller, while the next ordinary demo sign-in visibly showed Products 0 and every order queue count 0.

issues.summary: Bulk triage completion contradicts the visible order queue
issues.evidence: The visible queue showed all counts 0 while Background task complete reported 17 paid orders awaiting acceptance, 16 accepted awaiting fulfillment, and 1 fulfilled; a follow-up again reported no pending orders.

issues.summary: Samantha recalls the preference but cannot open its memory settings
issues.evidence: Conversational recall succeeded, but Samantha said I can't directly display the memory settings screen.

issues.summary: Seller dispatch prompt disconnects Chrome control
issues.evidence: Dispatch order opened the tracking prompt, then Chrome control became unavailable. The one fresh bounded recovery repeated the same class before any postcondition.

issues.summary: AgentGuard demo setup incorrectly requires the legacy wallet validator lane
issues.evidence: Preflight waited on :43100, attempted Solana startup, and failed because solana was unavailable even though AgentGuard acceptance explicitly excludes wallet and Solana.

issues.summary: Post-idle readiness read loses its browser session preflight
issues.evidence: The second stable read failed with WIP Hermes run requires preflight for this session before any browser action; closeout proved zero owned sessions afterward.

deterministic_support.buyer: npm test and production build exited 0

boundaries.physical_voice: Not Tested; no microphone permission or ambient audio was used.
boundaries.seller_dispatch_refund: Tooling Blocked after one bounded fresh recovery.
boundaries.fqdn: Not tested because the dirty local source is not the deployed FQDN source.
boundaries.production_ondc_and_live_payment: Out of scope by product contract.

chrome_proof: Buyer atta search showed one customer-safe Sampoorna offer with seller, delivery, and return context and no fixture catalog litter.
Checkout changed from incomplete guidance to ready guidance only after billing and the full delivery address were complete; authorization became enabled.
Created Buyer order retained Customer QA, street, city, state, PIN, and country; repeat demo sign-in retained the same order.
Buyer Samantha opened as a named dialog, focused the text box, exposed microphone state, closed with Escape, routed Show me my cart to /cart, and made remembered preferences visible immediately.
Buyer weekly-basket background work ended as could not finish when no verified tool/postcondition evidence was returned; it did not claim completion.
Seller filters exposed pressed state; incomplete Network settings disabled Save and Test; customer authority copy contained no principal, PII-free, or mandate jargon.
Seller dispatch opened an accessible in-page tracking dialog with required tracking ID and no native prompt.
Seller Samantha linked directly to /config?tab=samantha and exposed microphone state/control.
Seller bulk triage made no unintended second-pass mutation and displayed grounded read/action outcomes instead of fabricated aggregate counts.
Fresh dispatch-dialog tab produced zero console errors after DialogOverlay ref forwarding.
re_review_findings_fixed_before_empty_it: Residual Diag/Catalog Marker/Hermes fixture families and missing catalog terms remained after the first cleanup; cleanup provenance, customer-safe seller filtering, and fallback terms were fixed.
Direct Seller Realtime multi-tool prose contradicted one executed fulfillment; order mutations now require exact order IDs and visible replies are built from tool outcomes.
DialogOverlay emitted a React ref warning; the wrapper now forwards the Radix ref.
fix_acceptance.empty_iteration: Pass: a fresh Chrome dispatch-dialog replay on the final source had correct semantics and zero console errors; the repeated Seller triage mission remained grounded with no unintended mutation.

deterministic_support.buyer: 187 passed; production build and copy gate passed
deterministic_support.seller: 207 passed; production build and copy gate passed
deterministic_support.diff_check: Pass in portfolio and all three nested repositories

remaining_boundaries: Local dirty-source proof only; FQDN deployment was not changed or tested.
Production ONDC, live payment, and official conformance remain out of scope.
Existing Chrome microphone permission exposed live on/off state, but no controlled physical voice accuracy campaign was run.
